languages.text: "Представь мое удивление, когда она поведала, что приходится мне дочерью? Я жалею лишь о том, что она — дитя неравного союза, и я не мог назвать ее своей наследницей. Я доверил Ларии свою жизнь и судьбу династии, назвав ее своим сенешалем. Однако я был готов дать ей большее. Я был готов отдать в ее руки Торговый Патент".

"Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."
languages.original_text: "Представь мое удивление, когда она поведала, что приходится мне дочерью? Я жалею лишь о том, что она — дитя неравного союза, и я не мог назвать ее своей наследницей. Я доверил Ларии свою жизнь и судьбу династии, назвав ее своим сенешалем. Однако я был готов дать ей большее. Я был готов отдать в ее руки Торговый Патент".

I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

languages.text: "Stellt Euch meine Überraschung vor, als sie mir eröffnete, sie wäre meine Tochter. Ich bedauere nur, dass sie einer ungleichen Verbindung entsprang und ich sie nicht zu meiner Erbin machen konnte. Also vertraute ich Laria mein Leben und das Schicksal der Dynastie an, indem ich sie zu meiner Truchsessin ernannte. Und ich war bereit, ihr mehr zu geben. Ich war bereit, den Handelsbrief in ihre Hände zu legen."
languages.original_text: "Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

traits.locale_text: "Stellt Euch meine Überraschung vor, als sie mir eröffnete, sie wäre meine Tochter. Ich bedauere nur, dass sie einer ungleichen Verbindung entsprang und ich sie nicht zu meiner Erbin machen konnte. Also vertraute ich Laria mein Leben und das Schicksal der Dynastie an, indem ich sie zu meiner Truchsessin ernannte. Und ich war bereit, ihr mehr zu geben. Ich war bereit, den Handelsbrief in ihre Hände zu legen."

languages.text: « Je vous laisse imaginer ma surprise lorsqu'elle a révélé être mon enfant. Mon seul regret, c'est qu'elle soit née d'une union hors norme, ce qui ne m'a pas permis de la nommer comme héritière directe. J'ai confié à Laria ma vie et le destin de la dynastie en faisant d'elle ma sénéchale, mais j'étais disposé à lui donner encore plus : j'étais prêt à placer la lettre de marque entre ses mains. »
languages.original_text: "Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous laisse imaginer ma surprise lorsqu'elle a révélé être mon enfant. Mon seul regret, c'est qu'elle soit née d'une union hors norme, ce qui ne m'a pas permis de la nommer comme héritière directe. J'ai confié à Laria ma vie et le destin de la dynastie en faisant d'elle ma sénéchale, mais j'étais disposé à lui donner encore plus : j'étais prêt à placer la lettre de marque entre ses mains. »

languages.text: «Podrá imaginar mi sorpresa cuando reveló que era mi hija. Lo único que lamento es que, al ser fruto de una unión desigual, no podía nombrarla mi heredera. Confié a Laria mi vida y el destino de la dinastía nombrándola Senescal. Pero estaba dispuesto a darle más. A dejar en sus manos la Patente de Comercio».
languages.original_text: "Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

traits.locale_text: «Podrá imaginar mi sorpresa cuando reveló que era mi hija. Lo único que lamento es que, al ser fruto de una unión desigual, no podía nombrarla mi heredera. Confié a Laria mi vida y el destino de la dinastía nombrándola Senescal. Pero estaba dispuesto a darle más. A dejar en sus manos la Patente de Comercio».

languages.text: "Kızım olduğunu açıkladığındaki şaşkınlığımı hayal et. Tek pişmanlığım, dengim olmayan biriyle birlikteliğimin meyvesi olması ve onu vârisim ilan edemememdir. Hayatımı ve hanedanlığın kaderini Laria'ya emanet ettim, onu Seneşal olarak atadım. Ona daha fazlasını vermeye hazırdım. Ticari Ruhsatname'yi ona bırakmaya hazırdım."
languages.original_text: "Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

traits.locale_text: "Kızım olduğunu açıkladığındaki şaşkınlığımı hayal et. Tek pişmanlığım, dengim olmayan biriyle birlikteliğimin meyvesi olması ve onu vârisim ilan edemememdir. Hayatımı ve hanedanlığın kaderini Laria'ya emanet ettim, onu Seneşal olarak atadım. Ona daha fazlasını vermeye hazırdım. Ticari Ruhsatname'yi ona bırakmaya hazırdım."

languages.text: “当她告诉我她是我的女儿时，你可以想象我有多惊讶。我唯一的遗憾是，她出身于地位悬殊的结合，我无法立她为我的继承人。我把自己的性命，还有整个王朝的命运，都托付给了菈丽雅，委任她为我的总领。然而，我原本打算给她更多。我甚至准备把贸易授状交到她手里。”
languages.original_text: "Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

traits.locale_text: “当她告诉我她是我的女儿时，你可以想象我有多惊讶。我唯一的遗憾是，她出身于地位悬殊的结合，我无法立她为我的继承人。我把自己的性命，还有整个王朝的命运，都托付给了菈丽雅，委任她为我的总领。然而，我原本打算给她更多。我甚至准备把贸易授状交到她手里。”

languages.text: 「娘だと知った時の驚きを想像してみてほしい。唯一の悔いは、彼女は不平等な関係から生まれた子供で、私の後継者には名乗れなかったことだ。私はリアリアに命と王朝を託し、私の家令長に任命した。しかし、もっと与える準備はしていた。貿易証書を彼女に渡す準備をしていたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Imagine my surprise when she revealed she was my daughter. My only regret is that she was the child of an unequal union, and I could not name her my heir. I entrusted Laria with my life and the fate of the dynasty, appointing her my Seneschal. Yet I was prepared to give her more. I was prepared to place the Warrant of Trade in her hands."

traits.locale_text: 「娘だと知った時の驚きを想像してみてほしい。唯一の悔いは、彼女は不平等な関係から生まれた子供で、私の後継者には名乗れなかったことだ。私はリアリアに命と王朝を託し、私の家令長に任命した。しかし、もっと与える準備はしていた。貿易証書を彼女に渡す準備をしていたのだ。」
